# Step 03 — PO Detail (View Mode)

**Persona:** Purchaser (Purchasing Staff / Buyer)
**Module:** 1
**Section:** 1.3
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid`

---

## 1.3.1 Access Path

1. Log in as `purchase@zebra.com`
2. Navigate to **Procurement → Purchase Order** in the left sidebar
3. Click any PO number button in the list (Step 01)

---

## 1.3.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PO List"] --> create["2. Create PO"]
    create -->|"Blank / Manual"| detail["3. PO Detail"]
    create -->|"From Price List"| pricelist["2a. Price List Wizard"]
    create -->|"From PR"| frompr["2b. From PR Wizard"]
    pricelist --> detail
    frompr --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["4. Edit Mode"]
    edit -->|Submit| inprog(["IN PROGRESS — Pending FC Approval"])
    style detail fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.3.3 Screen Layout (DRAFT)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← Purchase Order   PO20260400002   DRAFT                       │
│                                          [Edit] [Comment]      │
│                                                                │
│ PO Information                                                 │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ PO No.        PO20260400002  │ Workflow     [Standard ▼] │   │
│ │ PO Type       Manual         │ Description  [____________]│   │
│ │ Vendor        [เขมิกา… ▼]    │ Delivery Date [2026-04-30]│   │
│ │ Currency      [USD ▼]        │ Exchange Rate 0.03119     │   │
│ │ Target Date   [__________]   │ Remarks      [____________]│   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Items                                              [Add Item]  │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ # │ Product │ Order Qty │ Unit │ Unit Price │ Disc% │ Tax│   │
│ │   │ Net Amount │ Tax Amt │ Total │ [Details]             │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Subtotal: 300.00  Discount: -0.00  Net: 300.00                 │
│ Tax: 21.00  Total: 321.00 USD          [Submit]                │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![PO Detail — DRAFT view](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.3.4 Screen Layout (IN PROGRESS — Returned by FC)

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ← Purchase Order   PO20260300029   IN PROGRESS                 │
│                                          [Edit] [Comment]      │
│                                                                │
│ Workflow Tracker                                               │
│  FC ✅ ──────── Create Request 🔵 ──────── FC ⭕              │
│                                                                │
│ PO Information (all fields disabled / read-only)               │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ PO No. │ Workflow │ PO Type │ Description │ Vendor       │   │
│ │ Delivery Date │ Currency │ Exchange Rate │ Remarks       │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Items                                                          │
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│ │ ☐ │ Status  │ # │ Product │ Qty │ Price │ Disc% │ Tax   │   │
│ │                 │ Net Amt │ Tax Amt │ Total │ [Details]  │   │
│ │ ☐ │ PENDING │ 1 │ …       │  1  │ 0.00  │ 0%   │ VAT7% │   │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                │
│ Subtotal: 46.06  Discount: -0.00  Net: 46.06                   │
│ Tax: 3.22  Total: 49.28 THB            [Submit]                │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![PO Detail — IN PROGRESS view (returned by FC)](data:image/png;base64,)

> **Key visual difference:** DRAFT POs do not show the Workflow Tracker section. IN PROGRESS POs always show it. The tracker reflects the workflow stage and completion state of each actor.

---

## 1.3.5 Page Header Elements

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Back link | "← Purchase Order" — returns to PO list |
| PO No. | Non-editable identifier displayed as plain text in header |
| Status badge | Grey "DRAFT" or yellow "IN PROGRESS" pill |
| Edit button | Blue/primary — enters Edit mode (Step 04) |
| Comment button | Opens comment/attachment sidebar |

---

## 1.3.6 PO Information Section — Auto-Populated Fields (Read-Only in View Mode)

| Field | Description | Source | Example |
|-------|-------------|--------|---------|
| PO No. | System-generated PO identifier | Auto on save | PO20260400002 |
| PO Type | Creation method (Manual / From Price List / From PR) | Set at creation | Manual |
| Exchange Rate | Rate for converting PO currency to base currency | System rate on save | 0.03119 |

---

## 1.3.7 PO Information Section — Editable Fields (Disabled in View Mode)

All fields below are **disabled** in view mode. They become editable only when the Purchaser clicks **Edit**.

| Field | Description | Mandatory | Type | Default |
|-------|-------------|-----------|------|---------|
| Workflow | Approval workflow template | Yes | Dropdown | — |
| Delivery Date | Expected delivery date | Yes | Date picker | — |
| Currency | PO transaction currency | Yes | Dropdown | — |
| Vendor | Supplier/vendor for this PO | Yes | Dropdown (lookup) | — |
| Credit Term | Payment terms agreed with the vendor | No | Dropdown | 30 Days |
| Description | Free-text description of this PO | No | Text area (256 chars) | — |
| Remarks | Additional notes for the PO | No | Text area (256 chars) | — |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (Currency display):** On PO20260400002 (DRAFT, USD), the Currency combobox renders with only a dropdown arrow icon and no visible currency text. THB POs render correctly. Confirmed rendering bug specific to non-THB (foreign) currencies in read-only combobox state.

---

## 1.3.8 Items Section — DRAFT PO

Items table on a DRAFT PO shows a summary row per item. Detailed per-item data (delivery locations, FOC, pricing) is accessed via the Details panel (§1.3.10).

| Column | Description | Sortable |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| # | Row sequence number | No |
| Product | Item name and code | No |
| Order Qty | Ordered quantity | No |
| Unit | Unit of measure | No |
| Unit Price | Price per unit in PO currency | No |
| Disc % | Discount percentage applied to the line | No |
| Tax | Tax profile name (e.g. VAT7%) | No |
| Net Amount | (Unit Price × Order Qty) × (1 − Disc %) | No |
| Tax Amt | Tax amount calculated from Net Amount | No |
| Total | Net Amount + Tax Amt | No |
| Details | Link button — opens Item Details side panel | No |

---

## 1.3.9 Items Section — IN PROGRESS PO (Returned)

When a PO is IN PROGRESS (sent for FC approval or returned by FC), the items table prepends two columns:

| Column | Description | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| Checkbox (☐) | Item selection for FC approval actions | Disabled in Purchaser view mode |
| Status | Current item approval status badge | PENDING (yellow), APPROVED (green), REVIEW (amber), REJECTED (red) |

The remaining columns are identical to the DRAFT table (Product, Order Qty, Unit, Unit Price, Disc %, Tax, Net Amount, Tax Amt, Total, Details).

> **Note:** In Purchaser view mode, item checkboxes are always disabled. Only the FC Approver can select items and take approval actions.

---

## 1.3.10 Item Details Panel

Clicking the **Details** link on any item row opens a right-side slide-over panel with three tabs.

### Details Tab

| Sub-section | Content |
|-------------|---------|
| Product | Product code and name (read-only) |
| Description | Item description text (read-only) |
| Locations table | Multi-row table: Location \| Delivery Point \| Qty per location |

The Locations table allows a single item to be split across multiple delivery locations. Each row specifies which stock location and delivery point receives part of the ordered quantity.

![Item Details panel — Details tab (multi-location)](data:image/png;base64,)

### Quantity Tab

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Order Qty | Total quantity ordered (same as inline table) |
| Base Qty | Quantity converted to the item's base unit of measure |
| FOC | Free-of-charge flag — marks items that are gifted/not charged |

![Item Details panel — Quantity tab](data:image/png;base64,)

### Pricing Tab

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Unit Price | Price per unit in PO currency |
| Tax Profile | Tax profile dropdown (e.g. VAT7%) |
| Tax % | Effective tax rate from the selected profile |
| Disc % | Discount percentage |
| Net Amount | (Unit Price × Order Qty) × (1 − Disc %) |
| Tax Amt | Net Amount × Tax % |
| Total | Net Amount + Tax Amt |

![Item Details panel — Pricing tab](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.3.11 Workflow Tracker (IN PROGRESS Only)

The Workflow Tracker appears at the top of the PO Information section only when the PO is IN PROGRESS.

| State | Icon | Meaning |
|-------|------|---------|
| Completed node | ✅ | Actor has taken action |
| Current node | 🔵 | Awaiting action from this actor |
| Pending node | ⭕ | Not yet reached |

**Example — Returned by FC for Purchaser revision:**

```
FC ✅ ──────── Create Request 🔵 ──────── FC ⭕
```

This means: FC has already reviewed once (✅), the PO is currently at the Purchaser / Create Request stage (🔵), and will go back to FC next (⭕).

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (Status label):** When FC sends a PO back for revision, the PO status remains "IN PROGRESS" rather than reverting to "DRAFT". The Purchaser can still submit the revised PO. The BRD lifecycle (Draft → Sent → Acknowledged → Partial Received → Fully Received → Closed/Cancelled) does not map to the observed status values. Clarification required.

---

## 1.3.12 Totals Bar

The totals bar appears at the bottom of the items section, above the footer Submit button.

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Subtotal | Sum of all item Net Amounts before tax |
| Discount | Total discount value (displayed as a negative amount) |
| Net | Subtotal after discount |
| Tax | Total tax across all items |
| Total | Net + Tax; displayed with PO currency code (e.g. 300.00 USD) |

---

## 1.3.13 Action Buttons (View Mode)

| Button | Color | Visible | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|---------|---------|
| Edit | Blue (primary) | Always | Enter edit mode to modify PO header and items — use when the PO needs corrections before submission |
| Comment | Outline/secondary | Always | Open comment and attachment sidebar — use to add notes or supporting documents visible to all workflow participants |
| Submit | Blue (primary) — footer | DRAFT and returned IN PROGRESS | Submit PO for FC approval — use when the PO is complete and ready for review without needing further edits |

> **Note:** Submit is available in view mode for DRAFT POs and for IN PROGRESS POs that have been returned by the FC for revision. A first-time submission is also possible directly from view mode without entering Edit first.

### On Submit (from View Mode)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Send the PO to the FC Approver for review without entering edit mode — use when the PO is complete as-is and no header or item changes are needed.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PO status is DRAFT or returned IN PROGRESS | BR-01 | Confirmation dialog opens | Button not visible |
| 2 | PO has at least one item | — | Proceeds to dialog | TBC — validation error expected |
| 3 | Purchaser confirms in dialog | — | PO status advances to IN PROGRESS; routed to FC | Dialog dismissed; no change |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Submit Purchase Order" |
| Message | "This will submit the PO for processing. Are you sure?" |
| **Submit** button (Blue) | Confirms submission; PO routed to FC |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; no change |

![Submit PO confirmation dialog](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.3.14 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | Purchaser can submit a DRAFT PO or a returned IN PROGRESS PO | FC approval workflow |
| BR-02 | All PO header fields are read-only in view mode | FR-PO edit permission |
| BR-03 | Workflow Tracker is visible only when PO is IN PROGRESS | UI state pattern |
| BR-04 | Item checkboxes are disabled in Purchaser view mode; only FC can select items | Role permission |
| BR-05 | Status badge colour: grey = DRAFT, yellow/gold = IN PROGRESS, teal = SENT, green = COMPLETED, dark grey = CLOSED | Status design system |
| BR-06 | Exchange Rate is auto-populated and read-only (set at creation or by system) | FR-PR-029 |
| BR-07 | Currency combobox in read-only state renders blank for non-THB currencies (e.g. USD); THB renders correctly — known rendering bug | UI defect |

---

## 1.3.15 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| PO has no items | Items section shows empty table; Submit button may still be visible (validation at confirm TBC) |
| PO is IN PROGRESS and not returned | Submit button still visible; clicking it may attempt resubmission (TBC) |
| FC has approved some items, returned others | Items table shows mix of APPROVED and REVIEW badges in Purchaser view |
| Currency combobox shows no text | Exchange Rate field confirms selected currency; known rendering issue |
| Purchaser clicks back link from view mode | Returns to PO list (Step 01) |
| Very long vendor name | Truncated with ellipsis in header; full name visible in Edit mode dropdown |
| PO with zero-value items | Amount shows 0.00; Total shows 0.00; submit is not blocked by zero total |

---

## 1.3.16 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click ← Purchase Order | Step 01 — PO List |
| Click Edit | Step 04 — Edit Mode |
| Click Submit → Confirm | PO advances to IN PROGRESS; returns to Step 01 — PO List |
| Click Submit → Cancel | Stays on Step 03 — PO Detail (view mode) |
| Click Comment | Comment sidebar opens (same page) |

---

## 1.3.17 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` | Fetch PO detail with items |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/submit` | Submit PO for approval |
